description_long: This object is a delicate flowering branch featuring a single, prominent pink bloom with soft, overlapping petals. The flower is attached to a slender, woody stem, which is adorned with several green, ovate leaves arranged alternately along its length. The petals of the flower are broad and slightly ruffled, forming a radial symmetry around the central reproductive structures, which are partially visible. The leaves have a smooth, matte surface and a slightly pointed tip, with visible veins running through them. The overall structure is lightweight and organic, with the flower positioned at the end of the stem, making it the focal point. The coloration is primarily a gentle pink for the flower and a vibrant green for the leaves, with the stem being brown and woody.
description: A pink, radially symmetrical flower with broad, overlapping petals on a slender stem, accompanied by green ovate leaves. The bloom is the focal point at the end of the branch.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full face of the pink flower, with its petals open and several green leaves surrounding it.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the profile of the flower, showing the layering of petals and the arrangement of leaves along the stem.
description_view_2: The rear view displays mostly the backs of the green leaves, with the pink flower partially visible and the stem extending upward.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the flower from behind and to the side, emphasizing the stem and the underside of the leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, overlapping slightly at the base and forming a whorled pattern around the center. The arrangement is symmetrical, with each petal radiating outward from the central axis.
